description: Reference numerical anchors for the production lower bound C_{1a} >= 1292/1000 = 1.292.  Produced by an arb-rigorous certifier at 256-bit precision; reproduced exactly by the Lean formalisation in lean/Sidon/MultiScale.lean and quoted in the accompanying paper at lower_bound_proof.tex (repository root).  Running `python -m delsarte_dual.grid_bound_alt_kernel.bisect_alt_kernel` emits a self-contained certificate that includes all bisection-history entries and terminal cell-search cells; this file records only the five interval-arithmetic anchors plus the rational target, for quick cross-checking and as the source of truth quoted by the Lean axioms.

K_2.tail_bound_derivation: |J_0(z)|^2 <= 2/(pi z) applied to both Bessel factors gives 4/(pi^4 d_i d_j xi^2); integrating yields 4/(pi^4 d_i d_j T) per half-line, summing+doubling gives 8 C^2 / (pi^4 T) with C = sum_i lambda_i/delta_i

min_G.lean_theorem: min_G_lower_bound  : minGLowerQ <= 9999798/10000000 (encodes certifier bound min G >= 0.99997987)
